title: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(40,30)'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='260' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='240' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <g transform='translate(60,50)' class='media-grid'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='110' y='0' width='100' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='220' y='0' width='100' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(180,100)' class='filter-container'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <text x='10' y='20' font-size='20' fill='#fff'>Filter by:</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(300,50)' class='sort-container'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <text x='10' y='20' font-size='20' fill='#fff'>Sort by:</text>
  </g>
  <circle cx='200' cy='220' r='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <circle cx='250' cy='220' r='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <circle cx='300' cy='220' r='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='120' y='280' font-size='20' fill='#fff'>Media Content</text>
  <text x='220' y='280' font-size='20' fill='#fff'>Table</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must include advanced filtering and sorting functionality
Must display data in a rich analytical table

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter logic, sort functionality, and media table data rendering.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
